message:
test(http2/hpack): fix RFC 7541 integer roundtrip test for new API

The HPACK integer codec API changed (encode now takes an explicit first-byte prefix, decode now reads the first byte itself). The old test still used the pre-change calling convention and was advancing the buffer manually.

Changes

- Call encode_integer(&mut buf, value, prefix_bits, 0x00).

- Call decode_integer(&mut src, prefix_bits) without pre-advancing or passing the first byte.

- Use usize/u8 literals to match the codec signatures and keep the table-driven cases readable.
